cta.title: Ready to ship with confidence?

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Can't find your answer here? Drop us a line — we get back within 24 hours.

items.q: How do I find my tracking number?
items.a: It is sent to you by email when your parcel is shipped. It starts with TS, followed by 9 digits and 2 letters for the destination country (e.g. TS947261583FR).

items.q: How long do international deliveries take?
items.a: Standard international deliveries take 3 to 7 business days depending on the destination. Express options are available on most corridors.

items.q: What if my parcel is lost or damaged?
items.a: Every shipment is insured up to its declared value. A claim can be opened from your dashboard or via the contact form.

items.q: Can I track several parcels at the same time?
items.a: Yes, your admin dashboard lets you manage all your orders and their tracking events in parallel.

items.q: Are your services available to individuals?
items.a: Public tracking is available without sign-up. To ship as an individual, contact us and we'll point you to the right plan.
All data is encrypted in transit and at rest, and stored in the European Union according to GDPR. Only authorised admins can access it.

chatbot.title: Trackship support
chatbot.subtitle: Instant answers to your questions
chatbot.welcome: Hi! I'm the Trackship assistant. Ask me anything about tracking your parcel or click one of the suggestions below.

suggestions.how_to_track: How do I track my parcel?
suggestions.not_found: My code isn't found — what now?

answers.how_to_track: Click "Track my parcel" on the home page, type your tracking number (format: TS + 9 digits + 2 country letters, e.g. TS947261583FR) and submit. You'll see the current status and the full history.
answers.format: Every tracking number follows TS + 9 digits + 2 letters for the destination country (ISO). Example: TS947261583FR for France, TS123456789DE for Germany.
answers.statuses: Possible statuses are: Pending (created), Picked up, In transit, Out for delivery, Delivered, Delivery failed, or Returned. The timeline on the tracking page details every step with its date and location.
answers.delivery_time: Delivery times depend on the route: 24-72 h for domestic shipments, 3-7 working days for international. An estimated date is shown on your tracking page.
answers.not_found: First, double-check the format (TS + 9 digits + 2 letters). If it looks right but no order shows up, contact the sender — the parcel may not have been registered in our system yet.
answers.unknown: I didn't quite understand. Here are the topics I can help with — feel free to click one:
